parameters.name: search_repos
parameters.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword. Parameters: query (search keywords, required), sort ('stars', 'forks', 'updated', optional, default 'stars')

value.sort: ={{ $fromAI('sort', 'Sort by: stars, forks, or updated (default: stars)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Sort by: stars, forks, or updated

parameters.name: get_repo_info
parameters.description: Get detailed info about a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner/org, required), repo (repository name, required)

parameters.name: list_issues
parameters.description: List issues for a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), state ('open', 'closed', or 'all', optional, default 'open')

value.state: ={{ $fromAI('state', 'Issue state: open, closed, or all (default: open)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Issue state: open, closed, or all

parameters.name: create_issue
parameters.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), title (issue title, required), body (issue description, optional), labels (comma-separated label names, optional)
